chilla.positive: A beautiful recipe card in a soft watercolor illustration style, featuring Moong Dal Chilla, a savory Indian pancake. The composition shows a stack of two golden-yellow pancakes made from mung beans, presented on a rustic, sage-green ceramic plate. The scene is viewed from a 3/4 overhead angle. Key ingredients are visible: the chillas are garnished with fresh green coriander leaves, and a small, handcrafted clay bowl of vibrant green chutney sits beside the plate. The setting is a plain wooden table, bathed in soft natural lighting. The artwork has gentle brush strokes, delicate paper texture, and a muted warm palette of cream, sage, terracotta, and muted gold, with hand-drawn line work and no harsh shadows.

The meal is presented on a rustic ceramic plate, seen from a 3/4 overhead view on a plain wooden table.
